name: Briona Gwydion the Dragonbein Range
author: Casuallynoted
description: From ․hack／／GU Last Recode․ Area Keywords Θ Hidden Forbidden Dragonbein․ In the Epitaph of Twilight - In the Epitaph‚ the Keel Mountains are home to an ape that can speak the language of humans․ It asks those who pass by the strange riddle˸＂What clings to you？ Bear it you cannot‚ accept it you cannot‚ but hidden it is from you․ Recite its name․＂ The answer being one's own name; the name of their shadow․ On the other side of the mountains lives a wise dragon named Sheraton․ In The World R˸2 backstory - Briona Gwydion the Dragonbein Range is made up of the bones of Gwydion‚ the true dragon who pulled the chariot of Taranis‚ the sun god․
